rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they refer to visible ports or features.
Use visible identifiers from the AADL model to define assumptions and guarantees.
generic_rules: Use explicit type declarations in AGREE to match AADL data types.
Avoid using AADL property names directly as AGREE variables.
Write range assumptions using named constants or visible relations.
Ensure that output guarantees relate visible outputs to visible inputs.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Assumptions and guarantees should use valid AGREE boolean expressions.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL timing properties directly in AGREE expressions.
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts.
irrelevant_topics: AADL model fusion and validation repair patterns
